instagram.post: Your first 100 customers are not a stepping stone. They are the business. We learned it the hard way, chasing reach until the ovens went quiet, then remembering names until they filled again. Growth is a memory problem, not a volume problem. #smallbusiness #customerloyalty #brandbuilding #localbusiness #entrepreneurship #marketingtruth #bakery
instagram.followUpComment: Which hundred people have you been quietly taking for granted? Save this, then go remember one of them by name this week. It changes everything.

linkedin.post: We spent a quarter optimizing for reach and nearly closed. The fix was not a bigger budget. It was remembering that a hundred loyal customers do the marketing no ad can buy. Retention is a relationship, not a funnel. #Retention #SmallBusiness #Brand
linkedin.followUpComment: The full breakdown of how we turned our slowest season into our steadiest is in the comments. Start with the people already at your counter.

storiesCaption: Tap through the whole story of how we stopped chasing followers and started remembering the hundred people who already loved us, because your slowest season becomes your steadiest one the moment you treat a loyal customer like a name and not a number on a dashboard you refresh at midnight.
